top_signals.title: The emigrants Israel can’t afford to lose
top_signals.summary: Those inclined to leave are the ones sustaining what’s left of the country’s liberal democracy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sunrun Surges Over 30% on Tesla Deal to Supply Power for AI
top_signals.summary: Sunrun Inc.’s stock jumped as much as 31% after the home solar provider announced it will partner with Tesla Inc. and Renew Home to provide power for data centers and utilities across the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Human rights allegations at critical minerals mines jump 73%
top_signals.summary: New report by UK-based NGO links the clean energy mining boom to rising human rights complaints, protests and lawsuits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application
top_signals.summary: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Gold selloff opens door to investors, miners have upside: BofA
top_signals.summary: Previously, the bank had set a price target of $6,000/oz. by next spring.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
